commit.message:
Increase default epochs to 2000 and add pixel-stable early stopping

Training could stall on corridor-shaped data: once most points were
correctly classified, sigmoid saturation made gradients near-zero,
and 500 epochs wasn't enough for the boundary to finish rotating.

Changes:
- model.py: default epochs 500 -> 2000, add patience=200 kwarg that
  stops training when the quantized pixel bytes are unchanged for 200
  consecutive epochs (keyword-only to preserve positional compat)
- cli.py: match new default epochs
- docs/app.js, docs/index.html: mirror both changes in the browser demo
- tests: add test_early_stopping, update test_training_history for new API

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Accessibility Audit + Component Tree endpoints

 A11yAuditReport
- Types: A11yImpact, A11yViolation, A11yAuditReport (browser.ts)
- TabManager.auditAccessibility(): CDP Accessibility.getFullAXTree +
  4 WCAG 2.2 rule checks (1.1.1 img alt, 2.4.6 button/link label,
  1.3.1 input label, 4.1.3 disabled control label)
- REST: GET /api/tabs/:id/a11y
- SDK: auditAccessibility(tabId): Promise<A11yAuditReport>

 ComponentTreeReport
- Types: ComponentFramework, ComponentNode, ComponentTreeReport (browser.ts)
- TabManager.captureComponentTree(): Runtime.evaluate probes React 16-18
  (__reactFiber/__reactInternalInstance), Vue 3 (__vue_app__), Vue 2
  (__vue__), and Svelte (window.__svelte__). Depth-capped at 30 levels;
  props shallow-stringified; functions/objects shown as [function]/[object]
- REST: GET /api/tabs/:id/component-tree
- SDK: captureComponentTree(tabId): Promise<ComponentTreeReport>

Re-exports: A11yAuditReport, A11yImpact, A11yViolation,
            ComponentFramework, ComponentNode, ComponentTreeReport

Docs: sections 7 and 8 fully documented with API, SDK examples,
      response shapes, rule tables, detection strategy, and CDP table

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[crossgen2] Add --strip-il-bodies option for composite R2R (#125647)

## Description

Add a `--strip-il-bodies` crossgen2 option that replaces IL method
bodies of successfully R2R-compiled methods with minimal stubs (`ret`)
in composite output assemblies. This reduces assembly size for scenarios
where IL interpreter fallback is not needed, such as full R2R on
iOS/MacCatalyst.

Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/124860

---------

commit.message:
fix: per-flavor platform override + BTRFS disk pressure on GDX builds

build-variant.yml: support per-flavor platforms field in build-config.yml
(.platforms // $v.platforms) so flavors can override the variant default.

build-config.yml: restrict albacore gnome50/gnome50-hwe/gnome50-gdx to
x86_64 only. libinput >= 1.27.0 (required by mutter-50) has only been
backported to x86_64 in the COPR. arm64 excluded until aarch64 libinput
lands (https://github.com/tuna-os/github-copr/issues/18).

Justfile: also remove the chain base image from BTRFS storage before
podman load. For GDX (S3+) builds the pulled S2 chain base image stays
in BTRFS alongside the pre-chunk image, pushing total usage high enough
to trigger the podman storage index corruption bug.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: honor launch port and stabilize stream

Propagate launched CDP ports across later connections, rotate cached clients when the resolved endpoint changes, and preserve requested-symbol settling in bounded price streams without repeated symbol switching.

Also surface unsuccessful stream results as MCP errors and keep launch port rollback behavior safe when a stored session port fails to connect.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v0.3.1: cross-file rename, refs precision, reindex command

- rename: reads disk files for closed buffers so all files get renamed
- rename: use rg_find_references + rename_in_scope for cross-file edits
- rename: scoped by parent class / package (same logic as references)
- refs: scoped rg search (Pass A qualified + Pass B import-gated bare)
- refs: decl_files filtered by enclosing_class_at to prevent bleed-across
- refs: wrapped in spawn_blocking to avoid blocking Tokio runtime
- refs: import/package lines filtered from rg results
- refs: in-memory supplement scoped to current file only
- reindex: workspace command 'kotlin-lsp/reindex' for full re-parse
- indexer: refactored index_workspace into index_workspace_impl
- tests: 3 regression tests for refs precision (187 total)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: prevent callee deopt from cascading to caller

When an inner function's Maglev/JIT code deopts during a call from a JIT
stub, fall through to interpreter_call_fallback instead of propagating
JIT_DEOPT to the caller. This prevents cascade deopts where one inner
function failure permanently kills the outer function's Maglev execution.

Also fixes RefCell already borrowed panic in try_execute_maglev by
dropping the immutable borrow guard before attempting borrow_mut on
deopt cache invalidation.

Key changes:
- exec_maglev_callee returning None no longer propagates to caller
- exec_jit_callee returning None no longer propagates to caller
- call_js_function falls through to interpreter on callee deopt
- Callee deopt counter incremented to eventually disable retries
- try_execute_maglev uses raw pointer to avoid borrow conflict

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add debug toggle for nginx log verbosity

Add a 'debug' boolean option (default: false) to addon config. When off,
routine polling requests (stock, locations, product_groups) and static
assets are suppressed from the nginx access log using map + if=$loggable.
Errors and meaningful actions are always logged. When on, all requests
are logged (previous behaviour).

commit.message:
fix(extractor): 支援 [CODE] 括號格式，PPV 6位數以上才 skip

- 新增 bracketCodeRe 預先從 [CODE]/(CODE) 括號內提取番號，
  避免 bracketRe 清洗時把放在方括號裡的番號一起刪除
- PPV skip 改為只 skip 6位數以上（FC2-PPV 業餘影片格式），

commit.message:
fix(routes): use maxAlternatives to return real road-following route alternatives (#77)

* feat(011): fix route planning to use real road alternatives via Azure Maps maxAlternatives

- Replace 3 separate Azure Maps API calls (routeType: fastest/shortest/eco) with a single
  call using maxAlternatives=2 parameter to get up to 3 geometrically distinct road-following
  routes in one request
- Routes now follow actual road networks (no straight lines through rivers/fields)
- All alternatives (up to 3) are returned and ranked fastest-first
- Synthetic fallback unchanged for no-API-key environments
- Add comprehensive Jest test suite (14 tests) covering:
  - Single API call with maxAlternatives=2 verified
  - All alternatives returned and ranked fastest-first
  - Intermediate waypoints present (road-following verification)
  - Fallback on error/empty/no-key scenarios
  - departAt parameter and rankingBasis handling
- Create specs/011-fix-route-planning-real-roads/ with full documentation:
  spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md,
  checklists/requirements.md (all items complete, Status: Implemented)

Fixes #76

All tests pass: 219 backend + 43 frontend

commit.message:
#9685 autotests setmolecules function refactoring (#9688)

* #9685 - Autotests: setMolecules function refactoring

* Sborka pochinena. YA ubral problemnyy put' cherez cross-env-shell v example/package.json i zamenil yego na obychnyye npm-skripty plyus nebol'shoy Node-khelper build-artifacts.cjs, kotoryy sam sozdayot build, ochishchayet dist/$MODE i kopiruyet artefakty bez shx/run-s. Zaodno ubral konflikt s npm lifecycle-khukom: staryy prebuild zapuskalsya avtomaticheski pri npm run build bez MODE, poetomu ya pereimenoval yego v prepare:mode-build i finalize:mode-build. Novyy helper ochishchayet soderzhimoye dist/$MODE, a ne udalyayet sam katalog tselikom, tak chto eto ustoychiveye k EBUSY na Windows.
Ещё
559
The build is fixed. I removed the problematic cross-env-shell path in example/package.json and replaced it with regular npm scripts plus a small Node helper, build-artifacts.cjs, which automatically creates a build, cleans dist/$MODE, and copies artifacts without shx/run-s.

I also fixed a conflict with the npm lifecycle hook: the old prebuild was running automatically when npm run build without MODE, so I renamed it to prepare:mode-build and finalize:mode-build. The new helper cleans the contents of dist/$MODE instead of deleting the entire directory, so it's more resilient to EBUSY on Windows.

* Revert changes to example/package.json and remove example/scripts/build-artifacts.cjs

commit.message:
Upgrade Sybase ASE connector to multi-table dynamic discovery (#542)

* Upgrade Sybase ASE connector to multi-table dynamic discovery

- Replaced single-table (sales only) connector with full multi-table connector
- Dynamically discovers and syncs all tables in the configured database
- Added primary key detection via sp_helpindex stored procedure
- Added dynamic Fivetran schema mapping for all Sybase ASE data types
- Fixed DECIMAL type conversion (Decimal -> str) for Fivetran protobuf compatibility
- Added incremental sync support with per-table state tracking
- Added optional table filtering via 'tables' config field
- Added sybase_ase_load_test.py for performance and regression testing
- Updated README with full setup, configuration, and usage instructions

* Fix flake8 linting errors in sybase_ase connector

- Remove trailing whitespace from SQL query string
- Remove unused variable col_length
- Flatten multi-line boolean condition to avoid W503
- Add missing whitespace around / operator in f-strings (E226)

* Fix black/flake8 conflict on incremental column condition

Rewrote multi-condition if statement to avoid W503 (flake8) while
also satisfying black's line-length formatting requirements

* Remove safe_log wrapper - use Fivetran SDK log directly

Per code review feedback: safe_log() was a defensive workaround for
standalone testing, but is unnecessary since connector.debug() properly
initializes the SDK runtime and logging. Replaced all safe_log() calls
with log.info/warning/severe directly, removed the fallback to Python
standard logging, and removed the unused logging import.

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Rewrite README for multi-table connector

- Removed all references to single-table sales-only connector
- Removed references to deleted HammerDB workload scripts and docs
- Documented dynamic schema discovery (sysobjects, syscolumns, sp_helpindex)
- Added full Sybase-to-Fivetran type mapping table
- Added optional table filtering via 'tables' config field
- Updated load test documentation to reflect sybase_ase_load_test.py
- Updated key functions table to reflect current codebase
- Bumped to version 2.0

* Restore README content

* Address PR review feedback: isinstance for Decimal, parameterised queries, extract get_selected_tables helper

* Fix Sybase ASE cloud sync: bundle libtdsodbc.so directly since installation.sh is never executed by the platform, and hardcode schema() to avoid gRPC timeout from DB connection

* Address PR feedback: replace config placeholders with real values, add retry logic to pyodbc.connect()

* Update examples/private_preview_features/sybase_ase/connector.py

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address PR feedback: remove unused get_table_columns() function and configuration.json.example

* Fix Node.js 20 deprecation warnings: bump action versions to Node.js 24 compatible

* Fix flake8 W503: rewrite retry log line to avoid line break before binary operator

* Remove get_table_columns() from README key functions table

* Revert workflow action version bumps — out of scope for this PR

* Restructure README to match README_template.md structure

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: harden metadata cache fallback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[development-pm-c150] PM Cycle 150 review - Critical organizational crisis, 9-cycle execution gap persists

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: replace permanent Maglev deopt flag with retry counter

The previous one-way Cell<bool> permanently disabled Maglev after a
single deopt, forcing all subsequent calls to the interpreter.  This
was too aggressive — many functions deopt once during their first
execution (e.g., property IC cold miss, array growth during init)
but succeed on subsequent attempts once type feedback is available.

Changes:
- Replace jit_maglev_deopted: Cell<bool> with deopt counter (Cell<u32>)
- Allow up to 5 retries before permanently disabling Maglev
- Invalidate cached executable on deopt so next attempt re-loads
  from the shared Arc (recompiled code with better type feedback)
- Add reset_maglev_deopt_count() for future recompilation support

Expected impact: benchmarks that deopt on first execution (prototype
chain IC miss, sieve array growth, closure context init) now get
retry attempts instead of permanent interpreter fallback.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
EXP-1201-1210: Conformal PIs, full stack R²=0.664 CV, horizon ensemble R²=0.839

Breakthroughs:
- EXP-1201: Conformal PIs achieve 80% coverage, 75.5 mg/dL width (AR)
- EXP-1202: Full stack (combined+AR+online) 5-fold CV = R²=0.664 NEW SOTA
- EXP-1203: AR benefit scales with horizon — 120min +0.430 lift!
- EXP-1210: Horizon ensemble+AR = R²=0.839 (needs CV validation)

Diagnostics:
- EXP-1205: Patient h has 64% NaN (root cause), k has 95% TIR (low signal)
- EXP-1206: 2/11 patients data-starved (e, j), most saturate at 40-60%
- EXP-1209: ACF(1)=0.474 explains AR improvement, positive skew=0.45

Dead ends: Kalman filter (0.221), temporal features (-0.003),
regime models (-0.014), feature interactions (-0.002)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: responsive multi-viewport capture suite

Capture screenshots at multiple named breakpoints in a single call with
optional pairwise pixel diffs between consecutive viewports.

**Types (packages/shared/src/browser.ts)**
- VIEWPORT_PRESETS const: 8 named presets from mobile-sm (375x667) to
  wide (1920x1080), each with width/height/mobile/label
- ViewportPresetName: keyof VIEWPORT_PRESETS
- ViewportPreset: { name, width, height, mobile, label }
- ViewportCapture: { preset, snapshotId, screenshot }
- ViewportSuiteReport: { tabId, runId, captures[], diffs[], capturedAt }

**TabManager (apps/desktop/src/main/tab-manager.ts)**
- captureViewportSuite(tabId, presets?, includeDiffs?)
  - Saves existing emulated viewport before run; restores after

    captureNamedScreenshot (snapshotId: tabId__preset__runId)
  - includeDiffs: pairwise diffScreenshots on consecutive captures
  - Restores original viewport or clears override if none was set

**AgentServer (apps/desktop/src/main/agent-server.ts)**
- POST /api/tabs/:id/viewport-suite { presets?, includeDiffs? }

**Agent SDK (packages/agent-sdk/src/index.ts)**
 ViewportSuiteReport
- Exports: ViewportPresetName, ViewportSuiteReport, VIEWPORT_PRESETS

**Docs**
- docs/dev-team-features.md: updated section 9 with full API docs,
  preset reference table, and usage example

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix RAG streaming, metadata handling, and Chroma watcher

- Add doc_exists() method to ChromaManager for orphan detection
- Auto-start Chroma file watcher on backend startup as daemon thread
- Implement orphan cleanup in watcher: detect stale doc_ids and remove them
- Increase SF_API_TIMEOUT from 30s to 60s for embedding requests
- Fix NoneType error when Chroma metadata is None (add defensive checks)
- Make RecommendationOut subject/year fields optional (support any markdown notes)
- Extract subject/year from metadata dict in sync API endpoint
- Improve logging in orphan detection with counts and status
- Watcher now detects file additions, modifications, and deletions correctly

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(aida/asia): add India + South Korea + Singapore — PM-KISAN/NPS/ComCare 2025

- data/aids_in.json: 11 Indian benefits (INR) — PM-KISAN ₹6,000/yr,
  Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY ₹5 lakh/yr, MGNREGA ₹267-357/day,
  PM Awas Yojana ₹2,67,000, PM Ujjwala, NSAP pension, scholarships SC/ST/OBC,
  PMMVY maternity ₹5,000-6,000, Sukanya Samriddhi 8.2% interest,
  PM Garib Kalyan Anna (800M beneficiaries), PM Jan Dhan ₹10,000 overdraft
- data/aids_kr.json: 10 Korean benefits (KRW) — NPS ₩1,000,000/mo max,
  Basic Livelihood Security ₩713,102/mo (2025), Basic Pension ₩342,510/mo,
  Unemployment ₩66,000/day max, Child Allowance ₩100,000/mo,
  NHIS universal health, Parental Leave ₩1,500,000 first 3mo,
  Disability Benefit ₩342,510/mo, Housing Benefit ₩330,000/mo Seoul,
  Education Support ₩487,000-654,000/yr
- data/aids_sg.json: 10 Singaporean benefits (SGD) — ComCare S$1,000/mo,
  Silver Support S$600-900/quarter, GST Voucher S$850/yr,
  Workfare S$4,200/yr, Baby Bonus S$13,000 max, MediShield Life,
  Student Care Fee Assistance S$290/mo, KidSTART, CHAS, HOPE scheme
- web/aides/monde/in.html: India page (FR) — JSON-LD BreadcrumbList/Article/
  FAQPage/GovernmentService (Ayushman Bharat), hreflang fr/en/hi/bn/te/mr/ta
- web/aides/monde/kr.html: South Korea page — Korean benefit names in table,
  hreflang fr/en/ko/zh/ja/de/es
- web/aides/monde/sg.html: Singapore page — ComCare GovernmentService,
  hreflang fr/en/zh/ms/ta/de/es (official languages)
- web/simulateur/in.html: India simulator CC='in', SUBDIV_KEY='state',
  6 Indian states, INR input
- web/simulateur/kr.html: Korea simulator CC='kr', SUBDIV_KEY='region',
  6 Korean regions, KRW input (no decimals)
- web/simulateur/sg.html: Singapore simulator CC='sg', SUBDIV_KEY='district',
  HDB flat types, SGD input
- web/simulateur/monde.html: Asia-Pacific 4→7 countries, IN/KR/SG cards added,
  JSON-LD hasPart updated
- web/aides/monde.html: 6→14 countries, IN/KR/SG cards, KPIs updated
- web/js/eu-simulator.js: add INR/KRW/SGD to EU_CURRENCIES,
  CURRENCY_AMOUNT_FIELD (in/kr/sg), INCOME_THRESHOLDS (15000/713102/2000),
  LOW_INCOME_THRESHOLDS (30000/1200000/4000)
- web/sitemap.xml: 8 new URL entries with hreflang alternates

Sources: pmkisan.gov.in, pmjay.gov.in, nrega.nic.in, india.gov.in,
bokjiro.go.kr, nhis.or.kr, nps.or.kr, msf.gov.sg, cpf.gov.sg, mof.gov.sg

commit.message:
feat(scan): add pilot scan to detect running copilot sessions

Walks the process tree of every tmux pane, matches PIDs against
copilot session-state lock files, and stores the mappings in the DB.
Useful for retroactively linking copilot sessions that were launched
before the capture wrapper was in place.
